## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 120)
- Agentic Claw version: (check footer of Mission Control)
